inputs.label: R1 (Gain Resistor)
inputs.businessContext: Value of the gain-setting resistor in the instrumentation amplifier circuit. Adjusted to set the desired gain.

inputs.label: R2 (Feedback Resistor)
inputs.businessContext: Value of the two feedback resistors (typically equal) in the first stage of the instrumentation amplifier. Usually matched for symmetry.

inputs.label: Vin+
inputs.businessContext: Non-inverting input voltage. Typically a small differential signal plus common-mode.

inputs.label: Vin-
inputs.businessContext: Inverting input voltage. The differential voltage is Vin+ minus Vin-.

inputs.label: Vref
inputs.businessContext: Reference voltage applied to the output stage, allowing level shifting of the output.
